title: God of War
description: Battle through the brutal realm of Norse mythology as Kratos, a god of war haunted by his past. Guided by his son Atreus, forge a new path across the Nine Realms — facing monsters, gods, and the darkest corners of a father's heart. A saga of rage, loss, and redemption unlike anything else in gaming.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: America, 1899. The age of outlaws is dying. As Arthur Morgan, loyal soldier of the Van der Linde gang, navigate a nation tearing itself apart. Every choice carries weight, every relationship has consequence, and the frontier holds as many dangers as it does wonders. The most immersive open world ever crafted.

title: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
description: Resurrection is not the end. You are a shinobi in late-1500s Sengoku Japan, stripped of your arm and your honor. Reclaim both through razor-sharp swordplay, cunning traversal, and relentless pursuit. Death is a lesson — master it, and nothing can stop you.

title: Grand Theft Auto V
description: Three criminals. One city. Infinite chaos. Los Santos is a sun-soaked sprawl of the superficial, where the pursuit of the dollar rules all. Switch between three protagonists — each with their own story — to pull off daring heists, outrun the law, and leave your mark on Southern San Andreas.

title: Cyberpunk 2077
description: Night City never sleeps, and neither will you. Step into a neon-drenched megalopolis of 2077 as V, a mercenary chasing immortality through a black-market implant holding the mind of a legend. In a city where corpo power and street violence collide, every choice reshapes your destiny.

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: The world is a brutal, beautiful place — and someone has to hunt its monsters. As Geralt of Rivia, traverse war-ravaged kingdoms, forge uneasy alliances, and face the hardest choices you'll ever make. With over 200 hours of content, this is one of the greatest RPGs ever made.
req_processor: Intel Core i5-2500K / AMD Phenom II X4 940
req_graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 770 / AMD Radeon R9 290

title: Elden Ring
description: Death is not the end. In the shattered Lands Between, rise as the Tarnished — exiled, forgotten, called back to claim the power of the Elden Ring. A vast open world of breathtaking vistas and punishing challenges awaits. Forge your legend, become an Elden Lord.
req_graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 8GB / AMD RX Vega 56 8GB

title: Dark Souls III
description: The fire fades, and the Lords of Cinder rise. Stand as the last warrior in a dying world where perseverance is the only weapon that truly matters. Dark Souls III is a masterwork of atmospheric world design, demanding combat, and the quiet triumph of never giving up.
req_graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 Ti / AMD Radeon HD 7950

title: Disco Elysium
description: You are a detective with no memory, no partner, and a city full of secrets. Disco Elysium is a groundbreaking RPG where a unique skill system lets you shape not just your character, but your politics, your philosophy, and your sanity. One of the most original games ever made.

title: Path of Exile
description: Exiled to the dark continent of Wraeclast, you must claw your power back from nothing. Path of Exile is a deep, relentlessly complex action RPG with hundreds of hours of content, an unmatched passive skill tree, and a thriving economy — completely free to play.
req_processor: Intel Quad Core / AMD Six Core
req_graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 650 Ti / ATI Radeon HD 7850

title: Among Us
description: Trust no one. Aboard a starship hurtling through space, crew members scramble to complete tasks while Impostors sabotage from the shadows. A game of deception, deduction, and sudden betrayal for 4 to 15 players. Every round tells a different story.
req_processor: Intel Core i5-6600 / AMD Athlon X4 880K

title: Civilization VI
description: One more turn. Lead your civilization from ancient origins to a space-faring future in the deepest strategy game in the series. Build cities, pursue diplomacy, wage war, and outpace rival leaders across hundreds of hours of ever-shifting grand strategy.
req_processor: Intel Core i5-4460K / AMD A10-7800 APU

title: Total War: WARHAMMER III
description: Daemonic legions pour through the rifts of reality. In the most ambitious Total War ever made, command vast armies across a world on the brink of annihilation. Real-time tactical battles meet deep turn-based campaign strategy in the ultimate dark fantasy war.

title: Minecraft
description: Every world is yours to shape. Dig into the earth, raise towering castles, survive the night, or explore an infinite procedurally generated world with friends. Minecraft is a canvas limited only by your imagination — and it has been captivating players for over a decade.
req_processor: Intel Core i5-4690 / AMD A10-7800 APU
req_graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 700 Series / AMD Radeon RX 200

title: Terraria
description: A world of possibility lurks beneath your feet. Dig, craft, build, and fight in a rich pixel-art world brimming with hidden treasures, fearsome bosses, and hundreds of hours of content. Terraria is endless adventure wrapped in pure sandbox freedom.
req_processor: Intel Pentium D or AMD Athlon 64 X2

title: Hollow Knight
description: An ancient kingdom lies in ruin beneath the surface. As a small, determined knight, descend into Hallownest — a hauntingly beautiful underground world of fierce warriors, forgotten lore, and a plague that threatens to consume everything. One of the finest action-platformers ever made.

title: Hades
description: Hell has never been this stylish. Defy your father — the god of the dead himself — in this award-winning roguelike. Every escape attempt through the Underworld deepens the story, sharpens your build, and draws you deeper into a narrative as gripping as any in gaming.

title: Celeste
description: The mountain tests more than your reflexes. Guide Madeline through a brutally precise platforming journey to the summit of Celeste Mountain — a deeply personal story about anxiety, self-doubt, and finding the courage to keep climbing. Challenging, beautiful, and unforgettable.

title: Dota 2
description: The battlefield never plays the same way twice. Dota 2 is a 5v5 strategic battle where over 100 unique heroes clash in a contest of skill, coordination, and ingenuity. With no pay-to-win mechanics and a skill ceiling that has no limit, it is the deepest free-to-play competitive game ever made.
req_graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 8600 GT / ATI Radeon HD 2600 XT

title: Counter-Strike 2
description: Two decades of competitive excellence, rebuilt from the ground up. Counter-Strike 2 brings the world's most iconic tactical shooter into a new era with sub-tick servers, overhauled maps, and a visual refresh — while preserving the pure, skill-based gameplay that defined competitive FPS forever.
req_graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 / AMD Radeon RX 470

title: Apex Legends
description: Drop in. Gear up. Become a champion. In the ever-evolving battle royale of Apex Legends, master a diverse roster of Legends with unique abilities and fight to be the last squad standing on the Frontier. Fast-paced, team-focused, and completely free to play.
req_graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 / AMD Radeon R9 290

title: Stardew Valley
description: Leave the grind behind. Your grandfather's old farm in Stardew Valley is overgrown, quiet, and full of potential. Grow crops, raise animals, mine for treasure, befriend your neighbors, and build the life you always wanted — at your own pace.

title: Devil May Cry 5
description: Dante, Nero, and a mysterious ally V converge to stop a demonic invasion rooted in a tree of flesh and blood. Devil May Cry 5 combines razor-sharp stylish combat with three distinct playstyles, delivering some of the best character action gameplay ever made.

title: Ghost of Tsushima
description: Mongol invaders have scorched Tsushima Island. As Jin Sakai, the last surviving samurai, choose between the way of the warrior and the way of the ghost to reclaim your home. A breathtaking open world painted in wind, steel, and sacrifice.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man Remastered
description: Peter Parker has spent eight years as Spider-Man, and New York finally trusts its hero. When a new criminal empire rises, only a true friendship can prevent the destruction of everything Spider-Man has worked for. Web-swing through a living, breathing Manhattan.

title: Batman: Arkham Knight
description: Gotham City is held hostage by the Scarecrow and a mysterious new threat, the Arkham Knight. As Batman, deploy the Batmobile and years of vengeance to end the Dark Knight's greatest chapter. The definitive conclusion to the Arkham trilogy.

title: Doom Eternal
description: Hell has invaded Earth. Become the Slayer in an epic single-player campaign to conquer demons across dimensions, wielding a devastating arsenal and brutal new combat mechanics. Rip and tear until it is done.

title: Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain
description: Nine years after the fall of Mother Base, Snake awakens to a war-torn world thirsty for revenge. Infiltrate an open world of tactical espionage where every mission can be approached your way, in the final entry crafted by Hideo Kojima.

title: Nier: Automata
description: In a war between human-made androids and invading machines, 2B, 9S, and A2 fight for a future they were never meant to see. A genre-bending action RPG about what it means to be alive, wrapped in breathtaking music and heartbreak.

title: Resident Evil 4
description: Leon S. Kennedy is sent to rescue the president's daughter from a remote European village infested with a mysterious cult. This ground-up reimagining modernizes a survival horror classic with terrifying new intensity.

title: Control
description: After a secretive agency in New York is invaded by an otherworldly threat, step into the shifting corridors of the Oldest House as Jesse Faden, the Bureau's new Director, wielding reality-bending powers to take back control.

title: God of War Ragnarök
description: Fimbulwinter is here. Kratos and Atreus must journey to each of the Nine Realms in search of answers as Asgardian forces prepare for a prophesied battle that will end the world. An emotional saga about fathers, sons, and fate.

title: Baldur's Gate 3
description: Gather your party and return to the Forgotten Realms in a story of fellowship and betrayal, sacrifice and survival. Corrupted by a mind flayer parasite, you must decide the fate of the Sword Coast in the deepest, most reactive RPG ever made.

title: Persona 5 Royal
description: Live a double life as a high school student by day and a Phantom Thief by night. Steal the corrupted hearts of society's rotten adults in a stylish, story-driven RPG blending turn-based combat with the rhythms of everyday school life.

title: Final Fantasy VII Remake
description: Midgar is a city controlled by the Shinra Electric Power Company. Join eco-terrorist group AVALANCHE and mercenary Cloud Strife as they fight to save the planet, in a full reimagining of one of the most beloved RPGs ever made.

title: Divinity: Original Sin 2
description: Gather your party, master a deep combat system built on elemental interactions, and explore Rivellon as a Godwoken competing for divinity. One of the finest cooperative RPGs ever crafted, with near-limitless player freedom.

title: Mass Effect Legendary Edition
description: Commander Shepard's fight to save the galaxy from the Reapers, remastered. This collection brings together three era-defining sci-fi RPGs with enhanced visuals and refined gameplay, honoring one of gaming's greatest trilogies.

title: Fallout 4
description: War never changes. Emerge from Vault 111 into the ruins of post-nuclear Boston as the Sole Survivor, searching for a missing son in a vast, dangerous wasteland shaped entirely by your choices, your build, and what you're willing to scavenge.

title: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
description: Dragons, once thought myth, have returned to Tamriel. As the Dragonborn, uncover your destiny amid a civil war tearing the frozen province of Skyrim apart. Over a decade later, still one of the most beloved open-world RPGs ever made.

title: Dragon Age: Inquisition
description: A rift has torn open the sky, unleashing demons upon Thedas. As the Inquisitor, unite fractured factions, recruit legendary companions, and close the Breach before chaos consumes the world in this sweeping, choice-driven RPG.

title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance
description: Bohemia, 1403. As blacksmith's son Henry, survive brutal medieval warfare, master realistic swordplay, and hunt down the men who destroyed your village. A gritty, historically grounded RPG with no magic, only steel and consequence.

title: Pillars of Eternity
description: In the world of Eora, a curse called the Hollowborn strips newborns of their souls. As the Watcher, unravel a mystery of gods and reincarnation in a classic isometric RPG that revives Infinity Engine-style storytelling for a new generation.

title: Diablo IV
description: Lilith has returned to Sanctuary, and hell follows in her wake. Descend into a dark, gothic world of relentless action RPG combat, endless build customization, and a shared world dripping with dread. Evil never truly dies.

title: Monster Hunter: World
description: Track, trap, and take down colossal monsters in the New World, a wild frontier teeming with ecological wonders and deadly threats. Craft weapons and armor from your kills in the game that redefined the hunting genre for the West.

title: Age of Empires IV
description: Relive humanity's greatest conflicts across four campaigns and eight civilizations, from the English longbowmen to the Mongol Horde. Age of Empires IV returns real-time strategy to its roots with modernized siege warfare and base-building.

title: StarCraft II: Wings of Liberty
description: Jim Raynor leads a rebellion against a corrupt Dominion while a mysterious alien threat looms. StarCraft II refines one of the most competitively demanding real-time strategy games ever built, balancing three utterly distinct factions.

title: XCOM 2
description: Twenty years after failing to repel an alien invasion, humanity fights a guerrilla war from the shadows. Command XCOM's last resistance in tense, turn-based tactical battles where every soldier lost is permanent.

title: Crusader Kings III
description: Death is only the beginning. Guide a dynasty across generations of medieval intrigue, marriage, betrayal, and conquest. Crusader Kings III turns genealogy into the deepest grand strategy sandbox on the market.

title: Europa Universalis IV
description: Lead any nation from the edge of the medieval era into the modern age. Manage trade, diplomacy, colonization, and war across four centuries in a grand strategy game legendary for its historical depth and complexity.

title: Company of Heroes 3
description: Command combined-arms warfare across the Mediterranean theater of WWII. Dynamic campaign maps and destructible battlefields make every engagement a fresh tactical puzzle in this acclaimed real-time strategy series.

title: Total War: Three Kingdoms
description: China, 190 CE. The Han dynasty crumbles, and warlords rise to fight for its throne. Command legendary heroes in an era where diplomacy is as sharp as any blade, blending large-scale battles with deep character-driven campaigns.

title: Stellaris
description: Chart humanity's path among the stars in a galaxy of alien empires, ancient anomalies, and existential threats. Stellaris blends grand strategy with sci-fi storytelling, where every playthrough writes a new chapter of the galaxy's history.

title: Frostpunk
description: In an eternal winter, the last city on Earth survives on a single generator's heat. As its ruler, balance survival against morality when every law you pass could save lives or break the people you're meant to protect.

title: Anno 1800
description: The dawn of the Industrial Revolution brings opportunity and upheaval. Build sprawling economic empires across continents, balancing production chains, diplomacy, and the needs of a growing population in this celebrated city-builder.

title: The Sims 4
description: Create unique Sims and control their lives, from first dates to dream careers to sprawling dynasties. The Sims 4 is a life simulation sandbox where every story, tragedy, and triumph is entirely up to you.

title: Cities: Skylines
description: Zone, build, and manage a thriving metropolis from a small township to a sprawling megacity. Cities: Skylines is a deep, modder-friendly city builder that simulates traffic, economy, and citizen happiness in exacting detail.

title: Planet Zoo
description: Build immersive habitats and care for hundreds of realistically simulated animals in a zoo management sim built on genuine conservation science. Every creature has needs, moods, and a life of its own to nurture.

title: Farming Simulator 22
description: Take on the role of a modern farmer, cultivating land, raising livestock, and expanding a business across North America, Europe, and beyond. Authentic machinery and seasonal cycles make every harvest matter.

title: Microsoft Flight Simulator
description: Take to the skies over a 1:1 recreation of the entire planet, powered by real-world satellite data and live weather. From gliders to jumbo jets, this is the most technically ambitious simulation ever built.

title: Two Point Hospital
description: Diagnose bizarre illnesses, design chaotic hospitals, and keep patients (mostly) alive in this satirical management sim. Balance staff, budgets, and increasingly ridiculous ailments across the quirky county of Two Point.

title: House Flipper
description: Buy, renovate, and sell rundown properties one nail at a time. Scrub grime, paint walls, and furnish rooms in a satisfying, hands-on renovation sim about turning wrecks into dream homes.

title: PowerWash Simulator
description: There is something deeply satisfying about blasting away years of grime. PowerWash Simulator turns a pressure washer into a meditative tool for restoring everything from muddy trucks to entire abandoned houses.

title: RollerCoaster Tycoon 3
description: Design gravity-defying coasters and manage every inch of a bustling theme park. A beloved classic that let a generation of players become architects of pure, chaotic joy.

title: Euro Truck Simulator 2
description: Haul cargo across a beautifully recreated Europe, one delivery contract at a time. Euro Truck Simulator 2 turns the long haul into a relaxing, meditative open road, with an entire trucking business to build along the way.

title: Undertale
description: A child falls into an underground world of monsters, where every enemy can be defeated without a single kill. Undertale reinvents the RPG with a memorable cast, surprising humor, and a combat system built on mercy as much as might.

title: Cuphead
description: Cuphead and Mugman owe a debt to the devil, and the only way to pay it back is defeating a rogues gallery of bosses. Hand-drawn in the style of 1930s cartoons, this run-and-gun is as gorgeous as it is punishing.

title: Ori and the Blind Forest
description: A guardian spirit named Ori must save a dying forest from despair. Ori and the Blind Forest pairs breathtaking hand-painted art with tight, emotional platforming, telling a story that lingers long after the credits roll.

title: Dead Cells
description: Wake, fight, die, and do it all again — a little stronger each time. Dead Cells fuses roguelike permadeath with Metroidvania exploration, delivering some of the tightest, most responsive 2D combat in the genre.

title: Slay the Spire
description: Climb an ever-shifting spire, building a deck of cards one battle at a time. Slay the Spire fused deckbuilding with roguelike runs and, in doing so, created an entire genre that dozens of games have since chased.

title: Vampire Survivors
description: Survive relentless waves of the undead armed with nothing but instinct and an ever-growing storm of auto-firing weapons. Vampire Survivors turned simplicity into pure, addictive chaos and spawned an entire genre overnight.

title: Katana Zero
description: A nameless assassin with the power to manipulate time slices through neon-lit enemies in single hits, one perfect run at a time. Katana Zero is a stylish, narrative-driven action-platformer soaked in synthwave atmosphere.

title: Hyper Light Drifter
description: A Drifter, sick with a mysterious disease, explores the ruins of a once-great civilization in search of a cure. Hyper Light Drifter tells its story entirely through pixel-art atmosphere, brutal combat, and haunting silence.

title: Return of the Obra Dinn
description: A merchant ship returns to port five years after vanishing at sea, its crew gone. As an insurance investigator with a magical pocket watch, reconstruct each crew member's final moment in this one-of-a-kind mystery.

title: A Short Hike
description: Claire just wants to reach the summit of Hawk Peak to get cell signal. A Short Hike is a tiny, gentle open-world about wandering, chatting with birds, and remembering that the journey matters more than the destination.

title: Valorant
description: A 5v5 tactical shooter where precise gunplay meets unique agent abilities. Valorant demands both mechanical skill and creative strategy in a game built from the ground up for competitive integrity.

title: Overwatch 2
description: A free-to-play, team-based shooter set in an optimistic future, where every match is a 5v5 battle between iconic heroes. Overwatch 2 delivers fast, colorful, deeply team-oriented combat unlike anything else in the genre.

title: Rainbow Six Siege
description: Destructible environments and asymmetric operator abilities turn every round into a tense siege. Rainbow Six Siege rewards teamwork, map knowledge, and split-second decisions more than any shooter on the market.

title: Rocket League
description: Soccer, but with rocket-powered cars. Rocket League turns physics-driven vehicular chaos into one of the most accessible yet deeply skillful competitive games ever made — free to play, endlessly replayable.

title: Fall Guys
description: Sixty jellybean-shaped contestants battle through chaotic obstacle courses for the crown. Fall Guys is pure, colorful party-royale mayhem, free to play and built for laughing at your own failures.

title: PUBG: Battlegrounds
description: A hundred players parachute onto an island, and only one team walks away. PUBG: Battlegrounds pioneered the battle royale genre with tense looting, tactical positioning, and a shrinking blue zone that shows no mercy.

title: League of Legends
description: Two teams of five champions battle across three lanes to destroy the enemy Nexus. League of Legends remains one of the most played competitive games in the world, with over a decade of strategic depth to master.

title: Fortnite
description: A hundred players drop onto an ever-changing island, building, looting, and fighting to be the last one standing. Fortnite blends battle royale with construction mechanics found nowhere else in the genre, free to play.

title: FIFA 23
description: The world's most popular sport, rendered with HyperMotion2 technology for the most authentic on-pitch movement yet. FIFA 23 brings men's and women's football together for the first time in franchise history.

title: Forza Horizon 5
description: Explore Mexico's vibrant open world, from lush jungles to living volcanoes, in the biggest, most dynamic Horizon setting yet. Forza Horizon 5 pairs stunning visuals with an arcade-accessible, endlessly joyful driving experience.

title: Gran Turismo 7
description: A celebration of car culture spanning generations, blending arcade thrills with pure racing simulation. Gran Turismo 7 features hundreds of meticulously modeled cars and a career mode that treats racing as an art form.

title: F1 23
description: Live the drama of the Formula 1 season with authentic tracks, teams, and drivers. F1 23 refines braking points and tire strategy into a razor-precise simulation, complete with a cinematic career story mode.

title: NBA 2K24
description: Step onto the hardwood with the most realistic basketball simulation on the market. NBA 2K24 brings deep franchise management, street-level MyCareer storytelling, and precision-tuned on-court mechanics.

title: Trackmania
description: Master razor-thin margins on wild, gravity-defying tracks built for speed and precision. Trackmania strips racing down to pure skill expression, with an endless stream of community-built circuits to conquer.

title: Need for Speed Heat
description: By day, compete in sanctioned street races for cash. By night, risk it all in illegal races that draw the attention of a corrupt police force. Need for Speed Heat turns Palm City into your personal playground.

title: Rider's Republic
description: Bike, ski, snowboard, and wingsuit across a massive open world stitched together from real American national parks. Ride alongside thousands of players in a euphoric, high-speed celebration of extreme sports.

title: Resident Evil Village
description: Ethan Winters searches for his stolen daughter in a nightmarish village ruled by four grotesque lords. Resident Evil Village mixes first-person survival horror with escalating dread and a shotgun-toting countess nobody will forget.

title: Phasmophobia
description: Grab your EMF reader and spirit box and investigate haunted locations with a team of fellow ghost hunters. Phasmophobia turns co-op horror into a tense, procedural game of evidence-gathering before something in the dark finds you first.

title: Dead Space
description: Engineer Isaac Clarke boards the derelict mining ship USG Ishimura to find it torn apart by monstrous Necromorphs. This ground-up remake rebuilds a survival horror classic with strategic dismemberment and suffocating atmosphere.

title: Outlast
description: Investigative journalist Miles Upshur enters an abandoned psychiatric hospital to expose its secrets, armed with only a camcorder. Outlast is unrelenting first-person horror where running, not fighting, is your only option.

title: Alien: Isolation
description: Fifteen years after the events of Alien, Amanda Ripley searches for answers aboard the deteriorating Sevastopol station, stalked by a single, terrifyingly intelligent Xenomorph. Survival horror built on pure, patient dread.

title: Portal 2
description: Wake up, Chell. Aperture Science is worse than you left it. Portal 2 expands the original's mind-bending physics puzzles with new mechanics, a wickedly funny script, and a fully cooperative campaign for two.

title: It Takes Two
description: Cody and May, on the verge of divorce, are magically transformed into dolls and must work together to reverse the spell. It Takes Two is a wildly inventive, purely cooperative adventure where every level reinvents the rules.

title: Firewatch
description: Henry retreats to a Wyoming fire lookout tower to escape his life, connected only by radio to his supervisor, Delilah. Firewatch is a tense, beautifully written mystery about isolation, trust, and the stories we tell ourselves.

title: Inside
description: A boy is drawn into a bleak, oppressive world, running and solving physics puzzles to survive an unknown threat. Inside is a haunting, wordless journey from the creators of Limbo, building to one of gaming's most talked-about endings.

title: Limbo
description: A boy wakes in a monochrome forest, searching for his missing sister. Limbo is a minimalist, atmospheric puzzle-platformer where every shadow hides a lethal trap, told entirely without a single word of dialogue.
